# Codexelis
> Codexelis is a software company based in Jaffna, Sri Lanka, delivering
> web development, mobile app development, AI integrations, UI/UX design,
> SEO, and digital marketing to clients in Sri Lanka and internationally.

## About
Codexelis is Jaffna's leading software company, operating from Northern
Province, Sri Lanka. The company serves businesses across South Asia, the
UK, New Zealand, and other international markets.

## Services
- [Web Development](/services/web-development): Custom websites and web
  applications using React, Node.js, and full-stack technologies.
- [Mobile App Development](/services/mobile-app-development): Native and
  cross-platform iOS and Android mobile applications.
- [AI Integrations](/services/ai-integrations): Chatbot development, LLM
  API integration, business process automation.
- [Design](/services/design): UI/UX design, brand identity, Figma systems.
- [SEO](/services/seo): Technical SEO, local SEO, AEO and GEO for Sri
  Lankan and international businesses.
- [Digital Marketing](/services/digital-marketing): Google Ads, social
  media advertising, email marketing, content strategy.

## Portfolio
- [Sterling Petroleum](/portfolio/sterling-petroleum): Web platform and
  advanced management system for a UK energy company.
- [Mathan Electronics](/portfolio/mathan-electronics): Comprehensive
  digital solution for a New Zealand electronics retailer.
- [Arcspazia](/portfolio/arcspazia): Digital project by Codexelis.

## Contact
- Website: https://www.codexelis.com
- Location: Jaffna, Northern Province, Sri Lanka
- Contact: https://www.codexelis.com/contact
